description: Governed overview of forecast drift signals, events, severity, family distribution and forecast-key risk. Read-only V2 snapshot served via datasource aegis-forecast-drift-csv. All logic is computed upstream in the governed engine; this dashboard only reads and filters.

options.content:
# AEGIS Forecast Drift — Overview

Governed forecast drift monitoring across **performance**, **shape**, **stability** and **volatility**. Read-only **V2** snapshot via datasource `aegis-forecast-drift-csv`. Every KPI, distribution and ranking below honors the shared filters (Forecast Key · Forecast Version · Region · Drift Status · Run ID).

panels.description: Distinct governed drift signal records honoring the shared filters (forecast_drift_signals.csv).

targets.filterExpression: region IN (${region:singlequote}) && forecast_key IN (${forecast_key:singlequote}) && forecast_version IN (${forecast_version:singlequote}) && drift_status IN (${drift_status:singlequote}) && calculation_run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})

panels.title: Total Signals

panels.description: Signals promoted to governance events (is_event = 1), honoring the shared filters.

targets.filterExpression: region IN (${region:singlequote}) && forecast_key IN (${forecast_key:singlequote}) && forecast_version IN (${forecast_version:singlequote}) && drift_status IN (${drift_status:singlequote}) && calculation_run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote}) && is_event == 1

panels.title: Total Events

panels.description: Mean forecast_drift_score across the filtered signals. Bands: Healthy 0–20 · Watch 20–40 · Warning 40–70 · Critical 70+.

targets.filterExpression: region IN (${region:singlequote}) && forecast_key IN (${forecast_key:singlequote}) && forecast_version IN (${forecast_version:singlequote}) && drift_status IN (${drift_status:singlequote}) && calculation_run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})

panels.title: Avg Drift Score

panels.description: Signals in the Critical band (drift score 70+), honoring the shared filters.

targets.filterExpression: region IN (${region:singlequote}) && forecast_key IN (${forecast_key:singlequote}) && forecast_version IN (${forecast_version:singlequote}) && drift_status IN (${drift_status:singlequote}) && calculation_run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote}) && drift_status == 'Critical'

panels.title: Critical

panels.description: Signals in the Warning band (drift score 40–70), honoring the shared filters.

targets.filterExpression: region IN (${region:singlequote}) && forecast_key IN (${forecast_key:singlequote}) && forecast_version IN (${forecast_version:singlequote}) && drift_status IN (${drift_status:singlequote}) && calculation_run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote}) && drift_status == 'Warning'

panels.title: Warning

panels.description: Signals in the Watch band (drift score 20–40), honoring the shared filters.

targets.filterExpression: region IN (${region:singlequote}) && forecast_key IN (${forecast_key:singlequote}) && forecast_version IN (${forecast_version:singlequote}) && drift_status IN (${drift_status:singlequote}) && calculation_run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote}) && drift_status == 'Watch'

panels.title: Watch

panels.description: Signals in the Healthy band (drift score 0–20), honoring the shared filters.

targets.filterExpression: region IN (${region:singlequote}) && forecast_key IN (${forecast_key:singlequote}) && forecast_version IN (${forecast_version:singlequote}) && drift_status IN (${drift_status:singlequote}) && calculation_run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote}) && drift_status == 'Healthy'

panels.title: Healthy

panels.description: Distribution of filtered signals by drift status (Healthy / Watch / Warning / Critical).

targets.filterExpression: region IN (${region:singlequote}) && forecast_key IN (${forecast_key:singlequote}) && forecast_version IN (${forecast_version:singlequote}) && drift_status IN (${drift_status:singlequote}) && calculation_run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})

panels.title: Drift Status Distribution

panels.description: Mean forecast_drift_score per forecast version. Dashed thresholds mark the Watch (20), Warning (40) and Critical (70) bands.

targets.filterExpression: region IN (${region:singlequote}) && forecast_key IN (${forecast_key:singlequote}) && forecast_version IN (${forecast_version:singlequote}) && drift_status IN (${drift_status:singlequote}) && calculation_run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})

panels.title: Average Drift Score Over Time (by Forecast Version)

panels.description: Count of filtered signals per dominant drift family (performance / shape / stability / volatility). Neutral color — family is a category, not a severity.

targets.filterExpression: region IN (${region:singlequote}) && forecast_key IN (${forecast_key:singlequote}) && forecast_version IN (${forecast_version:singlequote}) && drift_status IN (${drift_status:singlequote}) && calculation_run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})

panels.title: Signals by Dominant Drift Family

panels.description: Forecast keys ranked by average drift score. Max Drift Status is the severity band of the key's highest-scoring signal.
